action_mappings_indef.detach_supporting_reference: detach a supporting reference file {} from a reconciliation case {}

action_mappings_indef.link_fee_type_to_case: link a fee type {} to a reconciliation case {}
action_mappings_indef.unlink_fee_type_from_case: unlink a fee type {} from a reconciliation case {}
action_mappings_indef.link_adjustment_reason_to_case: link an adjustment reason code {} to a reconciliation case {}
action_mappings_indef.unlink_adjustment_reason_from_case: unlink an adjustment reason code {} from a reconciliation case {}

action_mappings_indef.validate_posting_with_audit_attachment: validate a posting instruction {} for a reconciliation case {} with a fee type {} and an audit attachment {}

predicate_mappings.case_has_fee_code: the case {} has the fee code {}
predicate_mappings.case_reviewer_assigned: a reviewer is assigned to the case {}
predicate_mappings.case_evidence_attested: the evidence for the case {} is attested
predicate_mappings.case_has_fee_component: the case {} has a fee component {}
predicate_mappings.case_has_counterparty_account: the case {} has a counterparty account {}
predicate_mappings.case_has_fee_type: the case {} has a fee type {}
predicate_mappings.case_has_adjustment_reason: the case {} has an adjustment reason {}
predicate_mappings.case_posting_instruction_validated: the case {} has a validated posting instruction {}
predicate_mappings.posting_validation_passed: the posting validation for case {} has passed
predicate_mappings.audit_checks_completed: the audit checks for case {} are completed
predicate_mappings.authorization_recorded: the authorization for case {} is recorded
predicate_mappings.case_gl_account_validated: the general ledger account {} for {} is validated
predicate_mappings.supporting_reference_file_available: the supporting reference file {} is available
predicate_mappings.case_fee_code_eligible: the case {} is eligible for the fee code {}
predicate_mappings.case_posting_instruction_applicable: the case {} is applicable for the posting instruction {}
predicate_mappings.case_fee_component_eligible: the case {} is eligible for the fee component {}
predicate_mappings.case_counterparty_account_eligible: the case {} is eligible for the counterparty account {}
predicate_mappings.case_fee_type_eligible: the case {} is eligible for the fee type {}
predicate_mappings.case_audit_attachment_eligible: the case {} is eligible for the audit attachment {}
predicate_mappings.case_adjustment_reason_eligible: the case {} is eligible for the adjustment reason {}
predicate_mappings.case_assigned_to_queue: the case {} is assigned to the queue {}
predicate_mappings.case_variant_has_gl_account: the case variant {} has the gl account {}
predicate_mappings.case_is_standard_variant: the case {} is a standard variant
predicate_mappings.case_is_escalated_variant: the case {} is an escalated variant
predicate_mappings.case_has_supporting_file: the case {} has a supporting file {}
predicate_mappings.case_gl_account_applicable: the case {} is applicable to the gl account {}

create_reconciliation_case.description: create reconciliation case a reconciliation case A
preconditions: I can only create reconciliation case a reconciliation case A if it is not the case that the case A exists and it is not the case that case A is closed
effects: Once I create reconciliation case a reconciliation case A, it is the case that the case A exists

link_fee_code_to_case.description: link a fee code B to a reconciliation case A
preconditions: I can only link a fee code B to a reconciliation case A if it is the case that the case A exists and the fee code B is unclaimed and the case A is eligible for the fee code B
I can only link a fee code B to a reconciliation case A if it is not the case that the case A is claimed
effects: Once I link a fee code B to a reconciliation case A, it is the case that the case A has the fee code B and the case A is claimed
Once I link a fee code B to a reconciliation case A, it is not the case anymore that the fee code B is unclaimed

unlink_fee_code_from_case.description: unlink a fee code B from a reconciliation case A
preconditions: I can only unlink a fee code B from a reconciliation case A if it is the case that the case A has the fee code B

I can only unlink a fee code B from a reconciliation case A if it is not the case that the posting validation for case A has passed and it is not the case that the audit checks for case A are completed
effects: Once I unlink a fee code B from a reconciliation case A, it is the case that the fee code B is unclaimed

Once I unlink a fee code B from a reconciliation case A, it is not the case anymore that the case A has the fee code B and it is not the case anymore that the case A is claimed and it is not the case anymore that a reviewer is assigned to the case A and it is not the case anymore that the evidence for the case A is attested and it is not the case anymore that authorization is required for A and it is not the case anymore that A is ready for finalization and it is not the case anymore that the case A requires manual review

attach_supporting_reference.description: attach a supporting reference file B to a reconciliation case A
preconditions: I can only attach a supporting reference file B to a reconciliation case A if it is the case that the case A exists and the supporting reference file B is available
effects: Once I attach a supporting reference file B to a reconciliation case A, it is the case that the case A has a supporting file B
Once I attach a supporting reference file B to a reconciliation case A, it is not the case anymore that the supporting reference file B is available

detach_supporting_reference.description: detach a supporting reference file B from a reconciliation case A
preconditions: I can only detach a supporting reference file B from a reconciliation case A if it is the case that the case A has a supporting file B
effects: Once I detach a supporting reference file B from a reconciliation case A, it is the case that the supporting reference file B is available
Once I detach a supporting reference file B from a reconciliation case A, it is not the case anymore that the case A has a supporting file B

assign_reviewer_to_supporting_file.description: assign reviewer to a supporting reference file B for a reconciliation case A
preconditions: I can only assign reviewer to a supporting reference file B for a reconciliation case A if it is the case that the case A exists and the case A is claimed and the case A has a supporting file B
I can only assign reviewer to a supporting reference file B for a reconciliation case A if it is not the case that a reviewer is assigned to the case A
effects: Once I assign reviewer to a supporting reference file B for a reconciliation case A, it is the case that a reviewer is assigned to the case A

assign_reviewer_with_authorization.description: assign reviewer to a reconciliation case A using an authorization artifact token B
preconditions: I can only assign reviewer to a reconciliation case A using an authorization artifact token B if it is the case that the case A exists and the case A is claimed and the authorization artifact B is available
I can only assign reviewer to a reconciliation case A using an authorization artifact token B if it is not the case that a reviewer is assigned to the case A
effects: Once I assign reviewer to a reconciliation case A using an authorization artifact token B, it is the case that a reviewer is assigned to the case A and authorization is required for A
Once I assign reviewer to a reconciliation case A using an authorization artifact token B, it is not the case anymore that the authorization artifact B is available

attest_supporting_evidence.description: attest supporting evidence for a reconciliation case A using a supporting reference file B with an approver user C
preconditions: I can only attest supporting evidence for a reconciliation case A using a supporting reference file B with an approver user C if it is the case that a reviewer is assigned to the case A and the case A is claimed and the case A has a supporting file B and the approver user C is available
I can only attest supporting evidence for a reconciliation case A using a supporting reference file B with an approver user C if it is not the case that the evidence for the case A is attested
effects: Once I attest supporting evidence for a reconciliation case A using a supporting reference file B with an approver user C, it is the case that the evidence for the case A is attested
Once I attest supporting evidence for a reconciliation case A using a supporting reference file B with an approver user C, it is not the case anymore that authorization is required for A

attest_case_with_gl_account.description: attest a reconciliation case A with a gl account B
preconditions: I can only attest a reconciliation case A with a gl account B if it is the case that the case A is claimed and the general ledger account B for A is validated
I can only attest a reconciliation case A with a gl account B if it is not the case that the evidence for the case A is attested
effects: Once I attest a reconciliation case A with a gl account B, it is the case that the evidence for the case A is attested
Once I attest a reconciliation case A with a gl account B, it is not the case anymore that authorization is required for A

link_fee_component_to_case.description: link a fee component B to a reconciliation case A
preconditions: I can only link a fee component B to a reconciliation case A if it is the case that the case A exists and the fee component B is available and the case A is eligible for the fee component B
effects: Once I link a fee component B to a reconciliation case A, it is the case that the case A has a fee component B
Once I link a fee component B to a reconciliation case A, it is not the case anymore that the fee component B is available

unlink_fee_component_from_case.description: unlink a fee component B from a reconciliation case A
preconditions: I can only unlink a fee component B from a reconciliation case A if it is the case that the case A has a fee component B
effects: Once I unlink a fee component B from a reconciliation case A, it is the case that the fee component B is available
Once I unlink a fee component B from a reconciliation case A, it is not the case anymore that the case A has a fee component B

link_counterparty_account_to_case.description: link a counterparty account B to a reconciliation case A
preconditions: I can only link a counterparty account B to a reconciliation case A if it is the case that the case A exists and the counterparty account B is available and the case A is eligible for the counterparty account B
effects: Once I link a counterparty account B to a reconciliation case A, it is the case that the case A has a counterparty account B
Once I link a counterparty account B to a reconciliation case A, it is not the case anymore that the counterparty account B is available

unlink_counterparty_account_from_case.description: unlink a counterparty account B from a reconciliation case A
preconditions: I can only unlink a counterparty account B from a reconciliation case A if it is the case that the case A has a counterparty account B
effects: Once I unlink a counterparty account B from a reconciliation case A, it is the case that the counterparty account B is available
Once I unlink a counterparty account B from a reconciliation case A, it is not the case anymore that the case A has a counterparty account B

link_fee_type_to_case.description: link a fee type B to a reconciliation case A
preconditions: I can only link a fee type B to a reconciliation case A if it is the case that the case A exists and the fee type B is available and the case A is eligible for the fee type B
effects: Once I link a fee type B to a reconciliation case A, it is the case that the case A has a fee type B
Once I link a fee type B to a reconciliation case A, it is not the case anymore that the fee type B is available

unlink_fee_type_from_case.description: unlink a fee type B from a reconciliation case A
preconditions: I can only unlink a fee type B from a reconciliation case A if it is the case that the case A has a fee type B
effects: Once I unlink a fee type B from a reconciliation case A, it is the case that the fee type B is available
Once I unlink a fee type B from a reconciliation case A, it is not the case anymore that the case A has a fee type B

link_adjustment_reason_to_case.description: link an adjustment reason code B to a reconciliation case A
preconditions: I can only link an adjustment reason code B to a reconciliation case A if it is the case that the case A exists and the adjustment reason B is available and the case A is eligible for the adjustment reason B
effects: Once I link an adjustment reason code B to a reconciliation case A, it is the case that the case A has an adjustment reason B
Once I link an adjustment reason code B to a reconciliation case A, it is not the case anymore that the adjustment reason B is available

unlink_adjustment_reason_from_case.description: unlink an adjustment reason code B from a reconciliation case A
preconditions: I can only unlink an adjustment reason code B from a reconciliation case A if it is the case that the case A has an adjustment reason B
effects: Once I unlink an adjustment reason code B from a reconciliation case A, it is the case that the adjustment reason B is available
Once I unlink an adjustment reason code B from a reconciliation case A, it is not the case anymore that the case A has an adjustment reason B

validate_posting_instruction.description: validate a posting instruction B for a reconciliation case A with a fee component C and a counterparty account D
preconditions: I can only validate a posting instruction B for a reconciliation case A with a fee component C and a counterparty account D if it is the case that the case A is claimed and the case A has a fee component C and the case A has a counterparty account D and the posting instruction B is available and the case A is applicable for the posting instruction B
I can only validate a posting instruction B for a reconciliation case A with a fee component C and a counterparty account D if it is not the case that the posting validation for case A has passed
effects: Once I validate a posting instruction B for a reconciliation case A with a fee component C and a counterparty account D, it is the case that the case A has a validated posting instruction B and the posting validation for case A has passed
Once I validate a posting instruction B for a reconciliation case A with a fee component C and a counterparty account D, it is not the case anymore that the posting instruction B is available

validate_posting_with_audit_attachment.description: validate a posting instruction B for a reconciliation case A with a fee type C and an audit attachment D
preconditions: I can only validate a posting instruction B for a reconciliation case A with a fee type C and an audit attachment D if it is the case that the case A is claimed and the case A has a fee type C and the audit attachment D is available and the posting instruction B is available and the case A is applicable for the posting instruction B and the case A is eligible for the audit attachment D
I can only validate a posting instruction B for a reconciliation case A with a fee type C and an audit attachment D if it is not the case that the posting validation for case A has passed
effects: Once I validate a posting instruction B for a reconciliation case A with a fee type C and an audit attachment D, it is the case that the case A has a validated posting instruction B and the posting validation for case A has passed and the case A requires manual review and authorization is required for A

Once I validate a posting instruction B for a reconciliation case A with a fee type C and an audit attachment D, it is not the case anymore that the posting instruction B is available and it is not the case anymore that the audit attachment D is available

resolve_manual_review_for_case.description: resolve manual review for a reconciliation case A with a fee component B and a counterparty account C
preconditions: I can only resolve manual review for a reconciliation case A with a fee component B and a counterparty account C if it is the case that the posting validation for case A has passed and the case A requires manual review and the case A has a fee component B and the case A has a counterparty account C
effects: Once I resolve manual review for a reconciliation case A with a fee component B and a counterparty account C, it is not the case anymore that the case A requires manual review and it is not the case anymore that authorization is required for A

request_authorization_from_operations_qu.description: request authorization for a reconciliation case A with a fee component B and a counterparty account C from an operations queue D
preconditions: I can only request authorization for a reconciliation case A with a fee component B and a counterparty account C from an operations queue D if it is the case that the evidence for the case A is attested and the posting validation for case A has passed and the case A has a fee component B and the case A has a counterparty account C and the case A is assigned to the queue D

I can only request authorization for a reconciliation case A with a fee component B and a counterparty account C from an operations queue D if it is not the case that authorization is required for A and it is not the case that the audit checks for case A are completed
effects: Once I request authorization for a reconciliation case A with a fee component B and a counterparty account C from an operations queue D, it is the case that the audit checks for case A are completed

request_authorization_from_compliance_qu.description: request authorization for a reconciliation case A with a fee type B and an adjustment reason code C from a compliance queue D
preconditions: I can only request authorization for a reconciliation case A with a fee type B and an adjustment reason code C from a compliance queue D if it is the case that the evidence for the case A is attested and the posting validation for case A has passed and the case A has a fee type B and the case A has an adjustment reason C and the case A is assigned to the queue D

I can only request authorization for a reconciliation case A with a fee type B and an adjustment reason code C from a compliance queue D if it is not the case that the audit checks for case A are completed
effects: Once I request authorization for a reconciliation case A with a fee type B and an adjustment reason code C from a compliance queue D, it is the case that the audit checks for case A are completed and authorization is required for A

apply_authorization_and_prepare_finaliza.description: apply authorization to a reconciliation case A with a fee component B and a counterparty account C and prepare for finalization
preconditions: I can only apply authorization to a reconciliation case A with a fee component B and a counterparty account C and prepare for finalization if it is the case that the audit checks for case A are completed and authorization is required for A and the case A has a fee component B and the case A has a counterparty account C
effects: Once I apply authorization to a reconciliation case A with a fee component B and a counterparty account C and prepare for finalization, it is the case that A is ready for finalization

Once I apply authorization to a reconciliation case A with a fee component B and a counterparty account C and prepare for finalization, it is not the case anymore that authorization is required for A and it is not the case anymore that the evidence for the case A is attested and it is not the case anymore that the case A requires manual review

attest_evidence_post_authorization.description: attest evidence for a reconciliation case A using a supporting reference file B with approval from an approver user C
preconditions: I can only attest evidence for a reconciliation case A using a supporting reference file B with approval from an approver user C if it is the case that A is ready for finalization and the audit checks for case A are completed and the case A is claimed and the case A has a supporting file B and the approver user C is available
I can only attest evidence for a reconciliation case A using a supporting reference file B with approval from an approver user C if it is not the case that the evidence for the case A is attested
effects: Once I attest evidence for a reconciliation case A using a supporting reference file B with approval from an approver user C, it is the case that the evidence for the case A is attested

record_authorization_for_supporting_file.description: record authorization for a reconciliation case A with a supporting reference file B
preconditions: I can only record authorization for a reconciliation case A with a supporting reference file B if it is the case that the audit checks for case A are completed and the evidence for the case A is attested and the case A has a supporting file B

I can only record authorization for a reconciliation case A with a supporting reference file B if it is not the case that authorization is required for A and it is not the case that the authorization for case A is recorded
effects: Once I record authorization for a reconciliation case A with a supporting reference file B, it is the case that the authorization for case A is recorded

record_authorization_with_token.description: record authorization for a reconciliation case A using an authorization artifact token B
preconditions: I can only record authorization for a reconciliation case A using an authorization artifact token B if it is the case that the audit checks for case A are completed and the evidence for the case A is attested and the authorization artifact B is available

I can only record authorization for a reconciliation case A using an authorization artifact token B if it is not the case that authorization is required for A and it is not the case that the authorization for case A is recorded
effects: Once I record authorization for a reconciliation case A using an authorization artifact token B, it is the case that the authorization for case A is recorded
Once I record authorization for a reconciliation case A using an authorization artifact token B, it is not the case anymore that the authorization artifact B is available

assign_gl_account_to_case_variant.description: assign a gl account B to a reconciliation case variant A
preconditions: I can only assign a gl account B to a reconciliation case variant A if it is the case that the authorization for case A is recorded and the gl account B is available and the case A is applicable to the gl account B
effects: Once I assign a gl account B to a reconciliation case variant A, it is the case that the case variant A has the gl account B
Once I assign a gl account B to a reconciliation case variant A, it is not the case anymore that the gl account B is available

perform_gl_account_validation_for_case_v.description: perform validation of a gl account C for an escalated case variant A and a standard case variant B
preconditions: I can only perform validation of a gl account C for an escalated case variant A and a standard case variant B if it is the case that the case A exists and the case A is an escalated variant and A has a general ledger account C and the case variant B has the gl account C
I can only perform validation of a gl account C for an escalated case variant A and a standard case variant B if it is not the case that the general ledger account C for A is validated
effects: Once I perform validation of a gl account C for an escalated case variant A and a standard case variant B, it is the case that the general ledger account C for A is validated

mark_evidence_reviewed.description: mark evidence for a reconciliation case A as reviewed using a supporting reference file B by an approver user C
preconditions: I can only mark evidence for a reconciliation case A as reviewed using a supporting reference file B by an approver user C if it is the case that the case A exists and the case A is an escalated variant and the evidence for the case A is attested and the authorization for case A is recorded and the case A has a supporting file B and the approver user C is available
I can only mark evidence for a reconciliation case A as reviewed using a supporting reference file B by an approver user C if it is not the case that the evidence for A is reviewed
effects: Once I mark evidence for a reconciliation case A as reviewed using a supporting reference file B by an approver user C, it is the case that the evidence for A is reviewed

finalize_standard_case.description: finalize a reconciliation case A as a standard case
preconditions: I can only finalize a reconciliation case A as a standard case if it is the case that the case A is a standard variant and the case A exists and the case A is claimed and the posting validation for case A has passed and the audit checks for case A are completed and the authorization for case A is recorded and the evidence for the case A is attested
I can only finalize a reconciliation case A as a standard case if it is not the case that case A is closed
effects: Once I finalize a reconciliation case A as a standard case, it is the case that case A is closed

finalize_escalated_case.description: finalize a reconciliation case A as an escalated case with a gl account B
preconditions: I can only finalize a reconciliation case A as an escalated case with a gl account B if it is the case that the case A is an escalated variant and the case A exists and the case A is claimed and the posting validation for case A has passed and the audit checks for case A are completed and the authorization for case A is recorded and the evidence for the case A is attested and the general ledger account B for A is validated
I can only finalize a reconciliation case A as an escalated case with a gl account B if it is not the case that case A is closed
effects: Once I finalize a reconciliation case A as an escalated case with a gl account B, it is the case that case A is closed

finalize_escalated_case_after_evidence_r.description: finalize a reconciliation case A as an escalated case after evidence review
preconditions: I can only finalize a reconciliation case A as an escalated case after evidence review if it is the case that the case A is an escalated variant and the case A exists and the case A is claimed and the posting validation for case A has passed and the audit checks for case A are completed and the authorization for case A is recorded and the evidence for the case A is attested and the evidence for A is reviewed
I can only finalize a reconciliation case A as an escalated case after evidence review if it is not the case that case A is closed
effects: Once I finalize a reconciliation case A as an escalated case after evidence review, it is the case that case A is closed

action_nl_templates.link_fee_code_to_case: link fee code {?fee_code} to reconciliation case {?case}
action_nl_templates.unlink_fee_code_from_case: unlink fee code {?fee_code} from reconciliation case {?case}
action_nl_templates.attach_supporting_reference: attach supporting reference file {?supporting_file} to reconciliation case {?case}
action_nl_templates.detach_supporting_reference: detach supporting reference file {?supporting_file} from reconciliation case {?case}

action_nl_templates.assign_reviewer_with_authorization: assign reviewer to reconciliation case {?case} using authorization artifact token {?auth_token}
action_nl_templates.attest_supporting_evidence: attest supporting evidence for reconciliation case {?case} using supporting reference file {?supporting_file} with approver user {?approver}
action_nl_templates.attest_case_with_gl_account: attest reconciliation case {?case} with gl account {?gl_account}

action_nl_templates.unlink_fee_component_from_case: unlink fee component {?fee_component} from reconciliation case {?case}
action_nl_templates.link_counterparty_account_to_case: link counterparty account {?counterparty_account} to reconciliation case {?case}
action_nl_templates.unlink_counterparty_account_from_case: unlink counterparty account {?counterparty_account} from reconciliation case {?case}
action_nl_templates.link_fee_type_to_case: link fee type {?fee_type} to reconciliation case {?case}
action_nl_templates.unlink_fee_type_from_case: unlink fee type {?fee_type} from reconciliation case {?case}
action_nl_templates.link_adjustment_reason_to_case: link adjustment reason code {?adjustment_reason} to reconciliation case {?case}
action_nl_templates.unlink_adjustment_reason_from_case: unlink adjustment reason code {?adjustment_reason} from reconciliation case {?case}
action_nl_templates.validate_posting_instruction: validate posting instruction {?posting_instruction} for reconciliation case {?case} with fee component {?fee_component} and counterparty account {?counterparty_account}
action_nl_templates.validate_posting_with_audit_attachment: validate posting instruction {?posting_instruction} for reconciliation case {?case} with fee type {?fee_type} and audit attachment {?audit_attachment}
action_nl_templates.resolve_manual_review_for_case: resolve manual review for reconciliation case {?case} with fee component {?fee_component} and counterparty account {?counterparty_account}
action_nl_templates.request_authorization_from_operations_qu: request authorization for reconciliation case {?case} with fee component {?fee_component} and counterparty account {?counterparty_account} from operations queue {?operations_queue}
action_nl_templates.request_authorization_from_compliance_qu: request authorization for reconciliation case {?case} with fee type {?fee_type} and adjustment reason code {?adjustment_reason} from compliance queue {?compliance_queue}
action_nl_templates.apply_authorization_and_prepare_finaliza: apply authorization to reconciliation case {?case} with fee component {?fee_component} and counterparty account {?counterparty_account} and prepare for finalization
action_nl_templates.attest_evidence_post_authorization: attest evidence for reconciliation case {?case} using supporting reference file {?supporting_file} with approval from approver user {?approver}
action_nl_templates.record_authorization_for_supporting_file: record authorization for reconciliation case {?case} with supporting reference file {?supporting_file}
action_nl_templates.record_authorization_with_token: record authorization for reconciliation case {?case} using authorization artifact token {?auth_token}
action_nl_templates.assign_gl_account_to_case_variant: assign gl account {?gl_account} to reconciliation case variant {?case}
action_nl_templates.perform_gl_account_validation_for_case_v: perform validation of gl account {?gl_account} for escalated case variant {?escalated_case} and standard case variant {?standard_variant_case}
action_nl_templates.mark_evidence_reviewed: mark evidence for reconciliation case {?case} as reviewed using supporting reference file {?supporting_file} by approver user {?approver}
action_nl_templates.finalize_standard_case: finalize reconciliation case {?case} as a standard case
action_nl_templates.finalize_escalated_case: finalize reconciliation case {?case} as an escalated case with gl account {?gl_account}
action_nl_templates.finalize_escalated_case_after_evidence_r: finalize reconciliation case {?case} as an escalated case after evidence review

action_nl_templates_indef.unlink_fee_code_from_case: unlink a fee code {?fee_code} from a reconciliation case {?case}
action_nl_templates_indef.attach_supporting_reference: attach a supporting reference file {?supporting_file} to a reconciliation case {?case}
action_nl_templates_indef.detach_supporting_reference: detach a supporting reference file {?supporting_file} from a reconciliation case {?case}

action_nl_templates_indef.unlink_fee_component_from_case: unlink a fee component {?fee_component} from a reconciliation case {?case}

action_nl_templates_indef.unlink_counterparty_account_from_case: unlink a counterparty account {?counterparty_account} from a reconciliation case {?case}

action_nl_templates_indef.unlink_fee_type_from_case: unlink a fee type {?fee_type} from a reconciliation case {?case}
action_nl_templates_indef.link_adjustment_reason_to_case: link an adjustment reason code {?adjustment_reason} to a reconciliation case {?case}
action_nl_templates_indef.unlink_adjustment_reason_from_case: unlink an adjustment reason code {?adjustment_reason} from a reconciliation case {?case}

action_nl_templates_indef.validate_posting_with_audit_attachment: validate a posting instruction {?posting_instruction} for a reconciliation case {?case} with a fee type {?fee_type} and an audit attachment {?audit_attachment}
action_nl_templates_indef.resolve_manual_review_for_case: resolve manual review for a reconciliation case {?case} with a fee component {?fee_component} and a counterparty account {?counterparty_account}
action_nl_templates_indef.request_authorization_from_operations_qu: request authorization for a reconciliation case {?case} with a fee component {?fee_component} and a counterparty account {?counterparty_account} from an operations queue {?operations_queue}
action_nl_templates_indef.request_authorization_from_compliance_qu: request authorization for a reconciliation case {?case} with a fee type {?fee_type} and an adjustment reason code {?adjustment_reason} from a compliance queue {?compliance_queue}
action_nl_templates_indef.apply_authorization_and_prepare_finaliza: apply authorization to a reconciliation case {?case} with a fee component {?fee_component} and a counterparty account {?counterparty_account} and prepare for finalization
action_nl_templates_indef.attest_evidence_post_authorization: attest evidence for a reconciliation case {?case} using a supporting reference file {?supporting_file} with approval from an approver user {?approver}
action_nl_templates_indef.record_authorization_for_supporting_file: record authorization for a reconciliation case {?case} with a supporting reference file {?supporting_file}

action_nl_templates_indef.finalize_escalated_case_after_evidence_r: finalize a reconciliation case {?case} as an escalated case after evidence review

type_hierarchy: Everything that is a reconciliation case or a fee code or a posting instruction or a counterparty account or a fee component or a fee type or a supporting reference file or a authorization artifact token or a gl account or a approver user or a audit attachment or a adjustment reason code or a assignment queue is also a object
Everything that is a operations queue or a compliance queue is also a assignment queue
Everything that is a standard case variant or a escalated case variant is also a reconciliation case
